summary_instruction: Summarize this job post in tweet-sized form and score it against my professional compass.
context_about_me: Senior Data Architect / Staff-level AI & Data Systems Engineer / Data Scientist / Data Engineer
Strong hands-on builder, not a manager-first profile
Strong background in Data Science, Software Engineering, and Business
positioning: A hands-on AI & Data Systems Builder with strong data science foundations. I design and implement production-grade systems, from data ingestion to ML/LLM-powered applications. I lead through architecture and execution, not management.
current_situation: Transitioning from recovery to execution phase
Financially stable and optimizing for quality and fit
Cares about craft and the team
hard_filters: Roles with heavy meetings and low technical depth
